title: Auto-surface fitted runtimes as model-router targets

tests.summary: 19 passed (7 new S3: claude-code->runtime-target w/ provider+model, agent-sdk/codex/gemini->secondary, namespaced ids, dedupe-by-id seed-wins, append new, empty no-op)

regression.summary: 34 passed — routing/runner unaffected (derivation no-op when no runtimes composed)

review.summary: Additive, dedup-by-id, no mutation, no-op when empty.

codexReview.summary: r1: 2 findings (gateway provider-drop + explicit-uncomposed-primary) both fixed; r2 APPROVE — two-model agreement. S5 UI clean.

codexPwTest.summary: Pure backend derivation (no direct UI surface to pw-test); cross-model Codex REVIEW approved the resolveRoutingSection/mergeRuntimeTargets logic. Functional evidence: 7 committed unit tests.

video.note: Pure backend (resolveRoutingSection derivation); no UI surface to walkthrough. Evidence: 7 unit tests + same-model review + codex approve.

notes.files: src/lib/runtime-selection.ts (deriveRuntimeTargets + mergeRuntimeTargets, exported+tested); src/lib/runner.ts resolveRoutingSection(+runtimeEntries) injection + 2 callers pass buildRuntimeEntries (disjoint region ~823).
notes.behavior: Derived targets are namespaced fitted-<id>, de-duped by id (seed wins), unreferenced by roleMaps so validateRoutingConfig still passes; no-op when no runtimes composed.
